author: taulepton_
content: Technically speaking, for EIP8025, we do mandate that node operators run an EL - this is because we do not want to introduce load-bearing assumptions on execution proofs just yet (this will come later in the mandatory proofs hardfork). The primary objective for eip8025 is to introduce execution proofs as first-class objects so we can gain experience on a live network. However, I have introduced no EL support in Lighthouse (for research and experimentation purposes), and you can find examples of how this works in the integration test cases here: https://github.com/eth-act/lighthouse/blob/optional-proofs/testing/proof_engine/src/lib.rs
